title: Junior Instructional Designer at Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
